UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT SAM PON AND SUSAN PON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE THE AMOUNT OF DAMAGES AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF WARRANTY OF QUIET ENJOYMENT, FRAUD, AND VIOLATION OF CCC 1942.4. ANY PERSONAL INJURY IS MERELY INCIDENTAL IN THESE CAUSES OF ACTION. PARAGRAPH 34, 56, 64. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO NEGLIGENCE, BREACH OF WARRANTY OF HABITABILITY, NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS, AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
No Appearance by Defendant and moving party.
Mark Hooshmand, Esq (415-318-5709) for Maria Vancil aka Morningstar, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs SAM PON and SUSAN PON's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Moving party failed to file a demurrer. Order is signed in open court. Judge: James J. McBride, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2013 Continued To Jan-29-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anna Liu, Esq. of Law Offices of Steven Adair Macdonald, (415-956-6488), for Sam Quon Pon, Defendant and moving party.
Mark Hoosmand, Esq. of Hoosmand Law Group, (415-318-5709), for Maria Vancil, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SAM PON and SUSAN PON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to allege the amount of damages as to causes of action for Breach of Warranty of Quiet Enjoyment, Fraud, and violation of CCC 1942.4. Any personal injury is merely incidental in these causes of action. Paragraph 34, 56, 64. Demurrer is overruled as to negligence, breach of warranty of habitability, negligent infliction of emotional distress, and intentional infliction of emotional distress. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2013 Continued To Oct-01-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anna Liu, Esq. of Law Offices of Steven Adair MacDonald, (415-956-6488), for Sam Quon Pon, Defendant and moving party.
Stephanie A. Foster, Esq. of Hoosmand Law Group, (415-318-5709), for Maria Vancil, Plaintiff and opposing party.

ARGUED. DEFENDANT SAM PON and SUSAN PON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to October 1, 2013. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
